description: Hardwired TCP/IP embedded Ethernet controller, SPI interface, 100Mbps

Network Configuration.name: MR
Network Configuration.description: Mode register for S/W reset, ping block mode, PPPoE mode

fields.name: RST
fields.description: S/W Reset. When '1', internal registers are initialized and auto-cleared after reset

fields.name: WOL
fields.description: Wake on LAN. '1' enables WOL mode with Magic Packet over UDP

fields.name: PB
fields.description: Ping Block Mode. '1' enables ping block (no ping response)

fields.name: PPPoE
fields.description: PPPoE Mode. '1' enables PPPoE mode for ADSL

fields.name: FARP
fields.description: Force ARP. '1' enables force ARP mode on every data transmission

Interrupts.name: IMR
Interrupts.description: Interrupt Mask Register [R/W]. Each Interrupt Mask Bit corresponds to the bit in Interrupt register (IR). If Interrupt Mask Bit is set to '1', interrupt occurs when corresponding IR bit is set to '1'. If IMR bit is '0', no interrupt occurs even if IR bit is '1'.

Socket Common.name: SN_IR
Socket Common.description: Socket n Interrupt Register. Provides interrupt types (establishment, termination, receiving data, timeout). Bits set to 1 when interrupt occurs and corresponding Sn_IMR mask bit is 1. Clear by writing 1 to bits.

fields.name: SEND_OK
fields.description: SEND OK Interrupt, occurs when SEND command completes

fields.name: TIMEOUT
fields.description: TIMEOUT Interrupt, occurs on ARP_TO or TCP_TO

fields.name: RECV
fields.description: Receive Interrupt, occurs when data packet received from peer

fields.name: DISCON
fields.description: Disconnect Interrupt, occurs on FIN or FIN/ACK packet from peer

fields.name: CON
fields.description: Connect Interrupt, occurs once when socket status becomes established

quality_issues: address 0x02 not found in register summary table

Socket Common.name: SN_SR
Socket Common.description: Socket n Status Register. Indicates socket status which changes with Sn_CR commands or packet transmission/reception.

fields.name: STATUS
fields.description: Socket status value. See value table for SOCK_CLOSED(0x00), SOCK_INIT(0x13), SOCK_LISTEN(0x14), SOCK_ESTABLISHED(0x17), SOCK_CLOSE_WAIT(0x1C), SOCK_UDP(0x22), SOCK_MACRAW(0x42), and temporary states SOCK_SYNSENT(0x15), SOCK_SYNRECV(0x16), SOCK_FIN_WAIT(0x18), SOCK_CLOSING(0x1A), SOCK_TIME_WAIT(0x1B), SOCK_LAST_ACK(0x1D)
